## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.10.5

### 🎥 Recordings
- Keeps cached camera playback on the HLS path.
- Adds bundled HLS playback support for desktop browsers such as Firefox.
- Keeps Safari/native HLS playback on the browser-native path.

### 🧰 Diagnostics
- Adds HLS player error details to the recordings panel debug log.
- Verifies cached HLS playlists rewrite segment URLs through the X-Sense recordings API.
